creator: iserikov@gmail.com
text:
I am the author of science/2d-rewriter. I do not FreeBSD machine right now. Please set PORTVERSION= to match GitHub tag 1.6. PORTREVISION= could be removed (right?).

Yet, I would like to reassign the port to ports@freebsd.org as I cannot use @acm.org and I have no email alias MAINTAINER= field.
